nature_pack: was_real_data=false — synthetic aging data generated by download_stack_datasets.py
stanford_slac: was_real_data=false — synthetic aging data generated by download_stack_datasets.py

quartz_wltp_36cell.note: See data/validate_quartz.py — run on real parquet files

nasa_b0018_ekf.note: See validation/nasa_validator.py — DualEKF on 122 held-out real discharge cycles
nasa_b0018_ekf.limitation: OCV fitted from dynamic discharge (not GITT); chemistry mismatch NMC811 vs Sanyo

bmw_i3_ekf.note: See data/fleet_validation_report.json — DualEKF on 63 held-out real trips

deng_charging_ekf.note: See data/fleet_validation_report_deng.json — DualEKF on 2000 held-out charging sessions from 20 vehicles

ved_ekf.note: See data/fleet_validation_report_ved.json — DualEKF on 38 held-out VED segments (30 vehicles, 20 trips limit)

nasa_degradation_module2.note: Module 2 stress-fatigue on NASA PCoE lab data. See validation/nasa_degradation_validator.py
nasa_degradation_module2.protocol: 1C CC discharge, DoD≈100%, T≈31–33°C, 132–168 cycles per cell
nasa_degradation_module2.eval_B_cross_cell_note: B0006 degrades 45% faster at similar D — manufacturing batch variability
nasa_degradation_module2.regime_comparison: Within-cell R²=0.97 (YES — stress-fatigue works in lab regime) vs Deng field R²=-1.80 (NO — SEI regime, per Sulzer 2021 Joule)

deng_degradation_module2.note: Module 2 v2: stress+SEI degradation. See data/deng_degradation_report.json
deng_degradation_module2.chemistry: NMC (auto-detected from cell voltage 3.50-4.26 V, all 20 vehicles)
models_compared: Model B: ΔSOH = β_c · D^γ_c + λ·√t (stress + SEI calendar)
deng_degradation_module2.dominant_driver: SEI/calendar aging (100% of modelled fade at 2.3 yr; stress term ≈ 3.5e-9)
deng_degradation_module2.data_snr: SNR < 1 for 8/20 vehicles; 5 vehicles show negative fade (BMS recal/seasonal). R² not reliable — use MAE_ΔSOH.
deng_degradation_module2.limitation: 2-year observation window; fade signal (~3.8% SOH) comparable to BMS noise (~2.8% SOH std). Needs 5+ yr data or lab cycling to validate stress term.
